name: alterlab-link-health
description: Audits and repairs Markdown link health across a skills repo via a four-tier pipeline (config hardening, intra-repo file-ref fixes, external URL substitutions, residual exclusions) and enforces a Tier 3 substitution guardrail that prevents regressions of previously-passing links; designed for lychee-based GitHub Actions link checkers but generalizes to markdown-link-check and similar tools. Use when the request mentions link audit, dead links, link health, lychee, broken links, link checker, mar
author: AlterLab-IEU
